testcase.name: testParallel
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 401, expected: 200, response time in milliseconds: 727, url: https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/api/v2/directory/employees?limit=14&offset=0&empNumber=169, response: {"error":{"status":401,"message":"Session expired"}} classpath:examples/users/consultaEmpleado.feature:12 ==> expected: <0> but was: <1> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:563) at examples.ExamplesTest.testParallel(ExamplesTest.java:15) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
